name: selldance
description: An end-to-end AI system for e-commerce video generation, supporting asset management, script generation, storyboard editing, voiceover, subtitles, and automated short-video production.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173"
